statement.informal: `gross_thrust` satisfies its @verify contract: under preconditions (mass_flow >= MDOT_MIN ∧ mass_flow <= MDOT_MAX ∧ exhaust_velocity >= 0.0 ∧ exhaust_velocity <= VEL_MAX ∧ exit_pressure >= P_MIN ∧ exit_pressure <= P_MAX ∧ ambient_pressure >= P_MIN ∧ ambient_pressure <= P_MAX ∧ exit_area >= AREA_MIN ∧ exit_area <= AREA_MAX), the function's result satisfies (True). This is the obligation Forge ships to a Lean target for DO-178C / IEC-61508 / ISO-26262 certification evidence.
statement.formal_lean:
-- @verify obligation pulled from jet_thrust.eml
-- theorem gross_thrust_nonneg_for_positive_mass_flow : ∀ args, (mass_flow >= MDOT_MIN ∧ mass_flow <= MDOT_MAX ∧ exhaust_velocity >= 0.0 ∧ exhaust_velocity <= VEL_MAX ∧ exit_pressure >= P_MIN ∧ exit_pressure <= P_MAX ∧ ambient_pressure >= P_MIN ∧ ambient_pressure <= P_MAX ∧ exit_area >= AREA_MIN ∧ exit_area <= AREA_MAX) → (True) := sorry
